title: cordyline fruticosa
intro: Cordyline fruticosa, also known as the ti plant, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its long, slender leaves and vibrant red or purple foliage. The medicinal properties of Cordyline fruticosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of consuming Cordyline fruticosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, while also exhibiting potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Cordyline fruticosa is often used in tea form, as well as in dried or powdered form, to harness its medicinal benefits and add flavor to various recipes.
